key_evidence: Maduro captured Jan 3, 2026 — regime change ending 12 years of authoritarian rule
Amnesty law passed Feb 19, 2026 covering political violence 1999-present
El Helicoide torture/detention site ordered closed
HRW/WOLA consensus: 'repressive architecture largely intact' — transition is fragile
methodological_note: Regime-change reset baseline. Pre-Jan 3 score of 4.4 is NOT used as prior. Score reflects first 100 days of transitional government under Acting President Delcy Rodríguez. Expected to shift materially in Q2-Q3 2026 as transition matures or stalls.
